overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking along a desert highway toward a retro-futuristic gas station, entering the convenience store, and exiting back outside. The scene features bright desert sunlight, industrial architecture, and transitions from outdoor highway to indoor commercial space.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the highway shoulder toward a distant gas station

entered.detail: large retro-style sign with neon lettering mounted on poles beside the highway
red and white metal guardrail running along the left side of the road
tall industrial electricity pylon with multiple crossbars
reddish-brown rocky hills and sparse desert vegetation
futuristic gas station with green canopy visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The player walks along a sun-baked desert highway with clear blue skies. A distinctive 'CHOOM' sign stands beside the road, while industrial power lines run parallel on the right. The landscape features reddish rock formations and sparse vegetation, with a gas station visible far ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: gas station forecourt with fuel pumps and canopy

events.description: turning right off the highway onto the gas station approach sidewalk
walking under the gas station canopy into shadow

agents.ego_description: approaching the convenience store entrance, passing fuel pumps and parked vehicles

notable_agents.action: person in red pants walking near the store entrance

entered.detail: large green and white metal canopy with neon trim covering the fuel pumps
futuristic fuel dispensers with digital displays under the canopy
white and red striped concrete blocks lining the walkway
several vehicles parked near the convenience store entrance
low-rise commercial building with large glass windows and green trim

segments.scene_description: The player turns off the highway and approaches the gas station forecourt. The scene shifts from open desert to a semi-covered area under the station canopy. Concrete barriers line the path, and parked cars sit near the convenience store entrance. A pedestrian in red pants walks near the entrance as the player approaches the glass doors.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic convenience store with neon lighting and food counters

events.description: entering the convenience store from the gas station forecourt

agents.ego_description: walking through the store interior past vending machines, food counters, and advertisements

notable_agents.action: customer sitting at the BUCK-A-SLICE counter eating
store employee standing near the entrance area

entered.detail: rows of illuminated vending machines with various products
blue curved food counter with neon signage and red stools
large glowing screens displaying product advertisements and menus
large blue ice dispenser with neon signage near the windows
large glass windows looking out to the gas station forecourt

segments.scene_description: The player enters the convenience store, transitioning from bright sunlight to artificially lit interior. The space features neon-lit vending machines, a BUCK-A-SLICE food counter with a seated customer, and various digital advertisements. The player walks past the counter and seating area toward the back of the store, passing an ice machine near the windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: gas station canopy area near exit

events.description: exiting the convenience store back to the gas station forecourt

agents.ego_description: walking out of the store back under the gas station canopy

entered.detail: green metal canopy structure with neon edge lighting
futuristic fuel dispensers visible again under the canopy
open highway and desert landscape visible beyond the station

segments.scene_description: The player exits the convenience store, transitioning from the dim interior back to the bright, semi-covered gas station forecourt. The green canopy and fuel pumps come back into view, with the desert highway visible in the distance. The scene ends with the player standing under the canopy near the fuel pumps.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a vast, sun-baked desert highway into the artificial interior of a roadside convenience store and back out again. It begins with a walk along a highway under clear blue skies, passing a CHOOM sign and industrial power lines amidst reddish rock formations. As the camera turns off the road, the open landscape shifts into the semi-covered forecourt of a gas station, moving past concrete barriers and parked cars toward the glass entrance. The scene then transitions from bright sunlight into a dim, neon-lit interior filled with vending machines and a food counter, before the camera tracks toward the back of the store. Finally, the perspective moves back through the doors, shifting from the artificial glow of the shop to the bright light of the green canopy and fuel pumps with the distant highway returning to view.
